Menswear Lookbook · No. 01

The Green
Door

Thirteen looks. One doorway. Tailoring and ease, shot against whitewashed stone.

Scroll

A single threshold, photographed from dusk into daylight. The clothes move from sharp tailoring to soft linen, the wall and the green door stay still.

CollectionSmart / Casual
